Payouts

Autozod Payouts

Monitor driver commission payouts, filter by agent and status, inspect failed payment details, retry failed payouts, and configure Stripe Connect API keys.

System Autozod
Role Finance / Admin
Updated March 2026
← Hub ↑ Autozod Overview Filter Details & Failures Configure Stripe
Overview

Payout Reports

Payout Reports shows every driver commission payment attempted through Stripe Connect — completed, pending, or failed.

💡
Navigation: Autozod top nav → Payouts
Payout Reports — summary cards (Total, Completed, Pending, Failed) and the payout table.
Summary Cards
Total Payouts
All payout records across all statuses.
Completed
Successfully paid to the agent's Stripe account. Green.
Pending
Queued but not yet processed. Amber.
Failed
Payment failed — needs action. Red.
Payout Table Columns
ID
Sequential payout record number.
Agent
Driver name and Agent UUID.
Task ID
Autozod task UUID linked to this payout.
Order ID
Hyperzod order number.
Amount
Driver commission for this task.
Status
Completed · Pending · Failed
Date
When the payout was created/attempted.
Retry
Blue Retry link — reprocesses a failed payout. Only visible on failed rows.
👁 icon
Opens full Payout Details modal.
Payout table showing Failed rows with Retry links and eye icons in the Actions column.
Filtering

Filter Payout Reports

Narrow the payout list by agent, status, or date range.

Filter bar — Agent dropdown, Status dropdown, Date Range field, Apply and Reset buttons.
Date range picker — select start and end dates then click Apply to filter.
Filter Controls
Agent
Filter to a specific driver or keep All Agents.
Status
All Status, Completed, Pending, or Failed.
Date Range
Dual-month calendar picker. Select start and end dates.
Apply
Click to run the filter.
Reset
Clears all filters and returns to the default view.
Inspecting

Payout Details & Failed Payouts

Open a payout record to see full details including the Stripe error response for failed payments.

Payout Details — shows Status, Agent, Task ID, Amount, Transaction ID, Payout Type, Environment, and the raw Stripe Payout Response error message.
Payout Details Fields
Status
Current payout status.
Transaction ID
Stripe transaction reference. Shows - if failed before a transaction was created.
Payout Type
destination_charges — Stripe Connect payout method.
Environment
live = real money. sandbox = test mode.
Payout Response
Raw Stripe API response. For failed payouts this shows the exact error — use this to diagnose the issue.
⚠️
Most common failure: "Insufficient funds in Stripe account." The platform Stripe balance needs topping up. Once resolved, click Retry on each failed row to reattempt.
Configuration

Configure Stripe Payout Settings

Update the Stripe Connect API keys used by Autozod to process driver payments.

Configure Payout modal — Sandbox Settings tab with Publish Key populated. Environment set to Live.
Live Settings tab — Publish Key awaiting entry. Secret Key already saved (masked).
Entering the Live Publish Key. Once both keys are filled and "Enable this payout provider" is checked, click SAVE CONFIGURATION.
Configuration Fields
Configure Payout button
Green button top-right of the Payouts page.
Environment
Live = real payments. Sandbox = test mode.
Sandbox Settings tab
Test credentials (pk_test_ / sk_test_) for development.
Live Settings tab
Live credentials (pk_live_ / sk_live_) for real payments.
Publish Key Required
From Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys.
Secret Key Required
Stored masked. Never share in plain text.
Enable this payout provider
Must be checked for Stripe to process payments.
Save Configuration
Click SAVE CONFIGURATION to apply. Takes effect on next payout attempt.
🔑
Keys location: dashboard.stripe.com → Developers → API keys. Use Restricted keys where possible. Never paste Secret Keys into plain text — enter directly into the field only.
Yolulo
